hero.body: EverNode is a software studio embedding intelligence into enterprise operations, custom software and AI agents, with the data infrastructure that connects them.

services.title2: One operating system for your operations.

items.d: Greenfield builds, legacy modernization, and white-glove rollouts. We ship, train your team, and stay on for the long haul.
Custom agents, document intelligence, and analytics built on your data. Models we serve, not models we rent.
details: Retrieval-augmented agents on your private corpus

projects.title: DoScreen
projects.desc: Platform for patient monitoring, including nutrion monitoring using ai, early detection and screening.

projects.title: TrustHRIS
projects.desc: Hospitl HRIS system for payroll, attendance, scheduling and people ops.

projects.title: TrustMedis HIS
projects.desc: Hospital Information System for clinical workflow, EMR and operations for hospitals.

projects.title: Mercator
projects.desc: Mangrove and carbon calcuation mapping and field operations platform.

projects.title: BPR DKI · JakON
projects.desc: Banking mobile onboarding and document intelligence for BPR network.

projects.title: TBGuard
projects.desc: Case management and information system for tuberculosis.

steps.d: We embed with your team for two weeks. Map the systems, the people, the friction.
A working prototype before a single production line. Decisions in code, not in slides.
Two-week sprints. Demos every Friday. The roadmap lives where the code lives.
We don't disappear at launch. SLAs, on-call, and the next quarter's roadmap.

manifesto.body1: Software is the connective tissue between what your business
manifesto.body3: . Most enterprises live with the gap. We close it.

pillars.d: Software is judged at the night-shift terminal, not the boardroom slide.
A real system in production beats six months of mockups, every time.
We name an owner. We pick up the phone. We measure what we said we would.

team.blurb: A small senior team. Each role owned by one person, accountable from discovery to operations.

members.name: Kevin Ashil
members.scope: Discovery, scoping, stakeholder alignment, roadmap & delivery.

members.name: Riandy Hasan
members.scope: Web, mobile and backend systems. Cloud and DevOps. Production owner.

members.name: M Risqi Firdaus
members.scope: Agents, RAG, document intelligence, vision and model serving.
